productDisplayName: Fila Men Sterling White Sports shoes
description: Comes with spare laces Well cushioned and lightweight, the fila Sterling soccer shoes are designed to offer a comfortable experience coupled with style. Team this with jeans and tees. Upper Synthetic leather upper with aggressive stitch detailing Reinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back foot Central lacing system for a customised Fit Branding on the side, tongue and collar Padded tongue with synthetic lining for comfort Synthetic lining at the collar with padding for ankle comfort Padded sockliner for instep comfort Midsole Cushioned EVA midsole for abrasion free comfort Outsole TPU outsole with branching out grooves for grip and traction Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the midfoot region and heel shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
